name: Weather
description: Display live weather in Smart Client view items (Open-Meteo)

name: Notepad
description: Simple text editor for operator notes in Smart Client view items

name: SnapReport
description: Select cameras and generate PDF snapshot reports for site surveys and compliance

name: MonitorRTMPStreamer
description: Capture desktop monitors and stream via RTMP

name: RTMPDriver
description: Receive RTMP push streams (H.264) directly into XProtect™

name: RTMPStreamer
description: Stream XProtect™ cameras to RTMP destinations (YouTube, Twitch, etc.)

name: CertWatchdog
description: Monitor SSL certificate expiry for all XProtect™ HTTPS endpoints and devices with dashboard and alerts

name: Auditor
description: Audit user access to recorded video with per-user rules and reason prompts

name: HttpRequests
description: Configure and execute HTTP requests as rule actions with custom payloads, authentication, and batch execution

name: SmartBar
description: Workspace toolbar button for Smart Client

name: FlexView
description: Freeform grid-based view layout designer with drag-and-drop pane creation, resizing, and editing

name: ViewCarousel
description: Cycle through XProtect Smart Client views inside a single view item slot

name: RTSPDriver
description: 4-channel RTSP pull driver with rich diagnostics (H.264/H.265)

name: SCRemoteControl
description: Control Smart Client remotely via REST API with Swagger UI (views, cameras, workspaces, modes)

name: Timelapse
description: Generate timelapse videos from recorded cameras with multi-camera stitch support

name: RemoteManager
description: Unified workspace for hardware web interfaces, custom websites, and RDP connections with tag-based filtering

name: BarcodeReader
description: Decode QR and 1D/2D barcodes from live camera streams (ZXing)

name: MetadataViewer
description: Subscribe to a metadata channel in the Management Client and view the live XML stream

name: ColoredTimeline
description: Render any pair of camera events (e.g. edge motion start/stop) as colored ribbons on the Smart Client playback timeline

name: PKI
description: Certificate vault: create / import / sign CSRs / export Root and Intermediate CAs and client certs (HTTPS, 802.1X, Service)
